title: SWD Eagles take on Kenya Simbas
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Phangela SWD Eagles hosted the Kenya Simbas in a pre-season friendly match at Van Riebeeck Stadium in Mossel Bay this week.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Phangela SWD Eagles hosted the Kenya Simbas in a pre-season friendly match at Van Riebeeck Stadium in Mossel Bay this week."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Both teams benefited from this outing as the Eagles are preparing for the Currie Cup First Division and the Simbas for the 2027 Rugby World Cup qualifiers.","html":"Both teams benefited from this outing as the Eagles are preparing for the Currie Cup First Division and the Simbas for the 2027 Rugby World Cup qualifiers."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In cold and windy conditions, both teams crossed the try line twice in what was a tightly contested first half.The halftime score was 12 - 12."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The conditions certainly did not dampen the crowd's enthusiasm as both teams did all they could in the second half. The match ended in a draw, 17 - 17.","html":"The conditions certainly did not dampen the crowd's enthusiasm as both teams did all they could in the second half. The match ended in a draw, 17 - 17."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The try scorers for the Phangela SWD Eagles were Kirwan Cupido, Seth Haddad and Marquit September. Eric Zana converted one of the tries.","html":"The try scorers for the Phangela SWD Eagles were Kirwan Cupido, Seth Haddad and Marquit September. Eric Zana converted one of the tries."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The day, which was organised by Mossel Bay Rugby Football Club, started with an opening match between Park and Diaz primary schools' U13 teams. Park won the match 25 - 0.","html":"The day, which was organised by Mossel Bay Rugby Football Club, started with an opening match between Park and Diaz primary schools' U13 teams. Park won the match 25 - 0."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: SWD Eagles take on Kenya Simbas
